truthBoundary: Local WordPress functional proof only. It runs the frozen v2.5 plugin against six cached public rendered-body fixtures in a disposable default-theme WordPress Playground bound to 127.0.0.1. It proves admin/build/draft/comparison/release-preview logic, content preservation gates, FAQ corrections, and responsive runtime behavior. Use CURRENT_VS_ENHANCED for pixel-faithful public-theme visual proof.

adminEvidence.title: Arc Guard Site Bridge ‹ Arc Guard — Local Staging Proof — WordPress

localBenchmark.label: Fixture-only local benchmark — not a substitute for the real Bluehost staging gate
localBenchmark.method: Chromium cache disabled; three document-only navigations per Current cached source and authenticated Release preview for all six IDs; all subresources blocked to remove the one-worker Playground asset queue; medians compare TTFB and loadEventEnd document time.
